product_depth.justification: Comprehensive retrospective structure with all 5 required sections, concrete extraction instructions, and output templates with table formats. Actionable -- gathers data from 6 sources for synthesis.
product_depth.drift_check: Same as prior round. Different feature (F-019 vs F-017/F-018) but same depth of coverage.

functionality.justification: Valid YAML frontmatter, registered in plugin.json, references all required data sources (evaluation JSONs, state.json, features.json, events.jsonl, metrics-summary). Precondition checks prevent running without artifacts.
functionality.drift_check: Same as prior round. All functional contract checks pass.

visual_design.justification: Command file follows exact format of existing commands (release.md, session.md). Same frontmatter fields, section hierarchy, and markdown formatting conventions.
visual_design.drift_check: Same as prior round. Format consistency verified against sibling commands.

code_quality.justification: Clean separation between data gathering (script subcommands) and synthesis (LLM). No script-level generation. Uses established subcommand names. Instructions specific enough for agent execution.
code_quality.drift_check: Same as prior round. Architectural separation is clean.

contract_checks.evidence: All 5 sections present: Timeline, Score Trends, Failure Analysis, Process Compliance, Recommendations
Data sources referenced: NN-evaluation.json, metrics-summary, state.json, features.json, read-events, NN-evaluation.md
./commands/postmortem.md present in plugin.json commands array at index 5
Frontmatter and section structure match release.md and session.md conventions
Synthesis delegated to LLM agent. No script-level markdown generation. Data gathering uses established subcommands.

non_blocking_issues: Process Compliance section asks about spec.md but Data Gathering does not instruct reading it
Sprint artifact completeness (contract, builder-report) not explicitly verified in data gathering
metrics-summary total_rounds may include in-progress rounds; should use last_completed_round instead

feature_evidence.reason: Command file exists with valid frontmatter, all 5 sections, all data sources referenced, registered in plugin.json, and delegates synthesis to LLM. All required contract checks pass.

test_results.coverage: Manual verification of Markdown command file structure and content

codex_detection.detection_method: enabledPlugins in .claude/settings.json + which codex on PATH
codex_detection.detection_result: codex@openai-codex found in enabledPlugins; /opt/homebrew/bin/codex on PATH
codex_detection.fallback_reason: codex:adversarial-review skill failed (disable-model-invocation); raw CLI codex review --commit HEAD succeeded

non_blocking.finding: spec.md not included in data gathering for Process Compliance verification
Sprint artifact completeness not explicitly verified for non-evaluation artifacts
In-progress rounds may inflate Rounds completed count via metrics-summary

internal_consistency.justification: Command uses same frontmatter schema and section structure as existing commands. Data source references use exact subcommand names from harness-companion.mjs.

intentionality.justification: References harness-specific artifact schemas and field names. 5 output sections map to F-019 spec. Builder report documents deliberate design choices.

craft.justification: Valid YAML frontmatter, consistent heading hierarchy, proper markdown table syntax, sequential section numbering.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Self-contained command with explicit extraction instructions per data source and exact output template column headers. Agent can follow without external docs.
